name: agent-test
description: Use for AGENT TEST — designing the measurement an AI agent or skill is judged by. DO — write the smallest eval, judge, trajectory test, benchmark, or activation eval that gates a change. REVIEW — audit an agent's eval suite, judge calibration, trajectory tests, benchmarks, or activation evals for trustworthiness, then score it. DESIGN — shape a failure-mode-first eval suite, calibrate an LLM-as-judge, build a held-out benchmark, or design activation/trigger evals, or explain a principle. Triggers on 'design our agent evals', 'is our LLM judge trustworthy', 'are these trajectory tests real', 'build a held-out benchmark for a model swap', 'test whether our skill activates correctly'. Do NOT use to operate or watch the loop these evals feed (use agent-ops), design the SDK/tool surface (use agent-dx), write agent-native docs (use agent-docs), or scaffold repo CI gates (use harden-repo-for-coding-agents), or to operate the eval/optimization loop, autonomy, and reliability (use agent-ops).

inspired_by.name: Judging LLM-as-a-Judge with MT-Bench and Chatbot Arena
inspired_by.author: Lianmin Zheng
inspired_by.contribution: Documents LLM-judge biases (position, verbosity/length, self-preference) and the need to calibrate a judge against human preference before trusting it — the basis for the judge-calibration discipline and the Vague Judge anti-pattern.

inspired_by.name: Improving Ratings: Audit in the British University System (Goodhart's Law)
inspired_by.author: Marilyn Strathern
inspired_by.contribution: When a measure becomes a target it ceases to be a good measure — the metric-gaming risk that benchmark and eval design must resist by rewarding behavior, not a proxy.

metadata.catalog_summary: Agent-as-subject-under-measurement: design the measurement an AI agent or skill is judged by — DO (write the smallest gating eval/judge/test), REVIEW (audit an eval suite, judge calibration, trajectory tests, benchmarks, or activation evals for trustworthiness, then score it), DESIGN (shape a failure-mode-first suite, calibrate a judge, build a held-out benchmark, design activation evals). Designs what agent-ops then operates.
